purpose: Deep postmortem and model sharpening for Game 6 forecast

core_correction.live_cleveland_tt_over_105_5: Win was overtime-assisted, not a clean regulation hit. Cleveland finished regulation at 103 and crossed only after OT extension.
core_correction.model_action: Separate regulation hit probability from OT-inclusive hit probability for all live team totals in close-game states.

cle.note: Cleveland created a cleaner playoff shot diet and generated the decisive free throw gap.

det.note: Detroit produced paint volume and offensive boards but relied heavily on short-midrange creation and Cade late-clock burden.

tobias_harris.diagnosis: Efficiency was acceptable; miss came from too few chances, not poor conversion.

paul_reed.diagnosis: Backup big absorbed Harris/Duren board equity.

duren.diagnosis: High chance volume but low conversion versus Allen/Mobley frontcourt pressure.

det_key_groups: Reed-Cunningham-Thompson-Jenkins-Harris: 12:14, -2, 22 points on 19 possessions, 12 rebounds, 5 offensive rebounds

new_model_patches.name: OT_INCLUSIVE_LIVE_TOTAL_SPLIT
new_model_patches.trigger: Live team total or full-game total when score margin <= 8 entering 4Q and projected clutch usage is concentrated
new_model_patches.effect: Report regulation probability and OT-inclusive probability separately. Do not score as a clean regulation edge when OT is required.

new_model_patches.name: WING_REBOUND_CHANCE_CAP_V2
new_model_patches.trigger: Forward rebound prop over when player projects 36+ minutes but historical/tracking rebound chances are <= 9 and backup big has 10+ rebound chances per 18 minutes
new_model_patches.effect: Cap mean rebounds and suppress ladder/alt 8+ confidence unless player has >= 11 projected chances.

new_model_patches.name: DET_BACKUP_BIG_REBOUND_STEAL
new_model_patches.trigger: Paul Reed/backup center active in closing or non-Duren frontcourt groups
new_model_patches.effect: Redistribute 1.0 to 1.8 rebounds away from Harris/Duren/Ausar depending on minutes.

new_model_patches.name: CLEVELAND_SPACING_BENCH_BOOST
new_model_patches.trigger: Strus or Merrill lineups with Harden and one Cleveland big
new_model_patches.effect: Upgrade CLE team total live ceiling and 3PA efficiency; stabilize comeback paths.

new_model_patches.name: CADE_USAGE_FATIGUE_GATE
new_model_patches.trigger: Cade projected 44+ minutes with usage carrying late-game offense
new_model_patches.effect: Raise Cade points/assists ceiling but increase Detroit turnover and late efficiency regression risk.

game6_preliminary_model_read.assumptions: Uses Game 5 rolling-window data only; pending Game 6 market, injury, and minutes confirmation.
market_bias_watch: Avoid overweighting Game 5 OT final total; regulation total was 206.
Cleveland team total overs need price discipline unless line stays below 109.5 or Detroit fatigue/guard defense worsens.
Tobias Harris 8+ remains downgraded unless projected rebound chances rise to 11+.
